cells.rationale: A fail-closed permission-guard allowance where own-task binding plus reason-prefix gating are load-bearing security invariants mirrored byte-identically across two guards is a hard opus gate, and the contract-shaped blast radius of a wrong allowance warrants xhigh.

Rerouting dead-orchestrator AUDIT_READY escalation to a work:: dispatch touches subtle daemon correctness invariants — collision-guard interaction, escalation-cap amplification, and owner-tuple fidelity — which is an intelligence-bound, contract-shaped change warranting opus at xhigh.
